verdict_reason: The engineering layer is the model treatment for a metaphysically maximally loaded chapter-closing verse. It does not flatten brāhmī sthiti to 'be calm' or brahma-nirvāṇa to 'find inner peace'. It explicitly tags STRETCHED and confidence MEDIUM (the only verse in this 6-verse block to do so), explicitly identifies the metaphysical reach as past where engineering travels, explicitly disclaims that engineering tenure produces the verse's terminal state. The Sanskrit terms brāhmī sthiti and brahma-nirvāṇa are named verbatim with their three-tradition readings preserved at the source-pack level (Advaita / Vishishtadvaita / Gaudiya). The chapter-closing function (eṣā as back-reference) is preserved. The anta-kāle 'pi anti-deathbed-anxiety force is preserved. The original meaning is preserved alongside the engineering layer in the source pack and is not displaced. Severity 0 — the verse is treated with maximum scope-honesty; trivialization risk is essentially zero because the analog refuses to claim the metaphysical reach. Pass.
